acceptanceReviewed.criterion: just qd-reports-check still uses scripts/qd-reports-check.sh as the entrypoint.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: justfile recipe qd-reports-check still invokes bash scripts/qd-reports-check.sh, and the entrypoint sources the checker helper files before running validation.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing report, run, finding, path, commit, and coverage validations still run and current repo state passes.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The refactor moved existing validation functions into domain helpers without weakening the jq expressions or shell checks. evidence/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/qd-reports-check.log records the full report/export validation passing.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Split checker logic into clear sourced helper files with every checker source file under 500 lines.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The helper split is common.sh, completion.sh, audit.sh, and roadmap.sh under scripts/qd-report-check/. evidence/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/line-count-check.log records all checker source files below 500 lines.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Required evidence logs are recorded under evidence/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, line-count-check.log, git-diff-check.log, and negative-smoke-unknown-run-kind.log.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Completion and audit reports use the matching nodeId and leave commits[] empty.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: reports/qd/m4-qd-report-checker-modularization/completion.json and audit.json both use nodeId=m4-qd-report-checker-modularization; completion commits[] is empty for pre-merge local reporting.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
